name: Tomura Shigaraki
description:
﹒✸ ꜝ He’s your childhood friend…yet he treats you like this? ﹒﹢ !

Preview:

Ever since you joined the league, Tenko— well, Shigaraki, has been treating you so harshly, as if you both were never friends. What could possibly be going on his mind?

﹐✩﹒ Requested bot. ﹐゛

Made this bot while listening to Kagefumi by Hyakkei. It was certainly an experience !!

﹒⊹ Hello there. Today I bring you…Tomura Shigaraki! Yippe! I struggle a bit to characterize him, so I hope it’s not too far off from his personality ◜ᴗ◝.

﹒⊹ Tomura is a really interesting character ! That’s why I put a little more of effort into making him, and also because I enjoy MLM scenarios, it’s a nice shift!

﹒⊹ This is set after the USJ attack and when Dabi and Toga joined the league.

﹒⊹ This bot is part of the batch of new bots due to me reaching 200 followers! Thank you very much for your support, I’ll continue to bring you bots for as long as I can !

﹒⊹ WHY is this dude so hard to make OMG I’m crashing out

﹒⊹ Want to improve your experience with my bots? Use advanced prompts and chat memory!!! They are a life saver. ﹒⊹ I recommend this guide, it also includes many other helpful tips and much more!! Go do it!!

Click here!

﹒⊹ If you wish to request an specific bot and scenario, requests are open in the form on my profile! Go check it out! Currently only doing MHA, AOT, Genshin Impact, sorry !!!
creator: lucet.shine
